name: Ahmad Faizal bin Razali
company: Precision Auto Parts Mfg. Sdn Bhd
review: We've been with Expanxion for over 5 years now. Their preventive maintenance programme has cut our forklift downtime by more than 60%. The technicians always arrive on schedule and the service reports are detailed and professional.

name: Lim Wai Keong
review: We rented 8 units from Expanxion for our peak festive season. The machines were delivered on time, in excellent condition, and when one unit had a minor issue, their team resolved it within the same day. Highly recommended.

name: Rajendran Pillai
review: Expanxion's team understood our site requirements immediately and recommended the right rough-terrain unit. The after-sales service and spare parts availability is excellent. We will definitely use them again.
